hooks.command: pnpm grok:hook -- stop 2>/dev/null || pnpm codex:hook -- stop; pnpm grok:tier:post-slice 2>/dev/null | tail -5 || true

pnpm grok:hook -- stop 2>/dev/null || pnpm codex:hook -- stop; echo 'Stop tier introspection:'; pnpm grok:tier:post-slice 2>/dev/null | tail -12 || echo 'Run: pnpm grok:tier:slice-start at slice begin; pnpm grok:tier:post-slice at end'
pnpm grok:hook -- pre-compact 2>/dev/null || pnpm codex:hook -- pre-compact
echo 'PreCompact tier introspection: re-read snapshot blocks only; run pnpm grok:tier:brief; downgrade scouts to explore+flash after compaction.'; pnpm grok:tier:brief 2>/dev/null | head -12 || true
pnpm grok:hook -- pre-compact 2>/dev/null || pnpm codex:hook -- pre-compact
pnpm grok:hook -- session-start 2>/dev/null || pnpm codex:hook -- session-start || true

echo 'Grok tier routing (grok-harness-only): before delegating read-only work use spawn_subagent explore+deepseek-v4-flash, NOT Cursor Task. Run pnpm grok:tier:brief for introspection prompts.'; pnpm grok:tier:brief 2>/dev/null | head -20 || echo 'Run: pnpm grok:tier:introspect after install'
pnpm grok:hook -- session-start 2>/dev/null || true; pnpm openclaw:lease -- status 2>/dev/null || true

echo 'SessionStart: chief-coordinator orchestrator. Rehydrate PROJECT_STATUS.md snapshot (~60 lines) + LEX_AGENTIC.md. Cheap consult: pnpm grok:tier:brief 2>/dev/null || true; pnpm openclaw:lease -- status 2>/dev/null || true'

echo 'PreToolUse tier guard: spawn repo-defined agents only (agents/**). Use pnpm grok:agent:spawn-spec --role <id>, not generic Cursor Task.'; pnpm grok:agent:consult -- --consult orchestration 2>/dev/null | head -5 || true

echo 'PreToolUse (lease safety per gap4 + AGENTS long-running-autonomy): if editing coord/states/AGENTS, ensure a lease before real edits. Advisory hook check only; run: pnpm openclaw:lease -- acquire --owner harness-autonomy --slice "<selected-slice>" --ttl-minutes 30. Current lease status:'; pnpm openclaw:lease -- status || true

echo 'PostToolUse (coord edit guard per AGENTS.md + .githooks/agentic-hook-runner.ts tie): running pnpm agent:alignment && pnpm docs:drift-check'; pnpm agent:alignment && pnpm docs:drift-check || echo 'Guard check completed with notes (exit non-zero ignored for PostToolUse; review output)'; echo 'OpenClaw-style tie: .githooks pre-commit/pre-push also run the agentic-hook-runner.ts (drift/alignment/architecture/post-slice) on git ops for these files.'
echo 'PostToolUse Bash: consider affected package test or runner if coord change (see tools/openclinxr/openclaw/agentic-hook-runner.ts --profile local-exam or pre-commit)'
